short: Google's cloud platform offering TPUs, GPUs, and managed services for AI workloads.
definition: Google Cloud is Google's cloud computing platform and a major provider of AI infrastructure. It offers TPU and GPU computing power (specialized chips for AI work) along with Vertex AI, a managed environment for training, tuning, and deploying models, including access to Gemini and open models. It serves as core infrastructure for organizations building and running AI systems.
